name: R5AnnotationElementMapToR4
title: Cross-version mapping for FHIR R5 Annotation to FHIR R4 Annotation
description: This ConceptMap represents cross-version mappings for elements from a FHIR R5 Annotation to FHIR R4.

target.comment:
Element `Annotation.author[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Annotation.author[x]` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The standard extension `alternate-reference` has been mapped as the representation of FHIR R5 element `Annotation.author[x]` with unmapped reference targets: PractitionerRole.
Source element `Annotation.author[x]` has unmapped reference types. While the target element `Annotation.author[x]` is a choice type and does not allow extensions, the `alternate-reference` extension can be applied to Reference values within it.
Organization is used when there's no need for specific attribution as to who made the comment.

Element `Annotation.author[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Annotation.author[x]` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The standard extension `alternate-reference` has been mapped as the representation of FHIR R5 element `Annotation.author[x]` with unmapped reference targets: PractitionerRole.
Source element `Annotation.author[x]` has unmapped reference types. While the target element `Annotation.author[x]` is a choice type and does not allow extensions, the `alternate-reference` extension can be applied to Reference values within it.
Organization is used when there's no need for specific attribution as to who made the comment.
Element `Annotation.time` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Annotation.time` as `Equivalent`.
Element `Annotation.time` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Annotation.time` as `Equivalent`.
Element `Annotation.text` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Annotation.text` as `Equivalent`.
Element `Annotation.text` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Annotation.text` as `Equivalent`.
